name: Bee

attacks.name: aerial peck
attacks.tell: It flies in circles and then dives with its stinger first.
attacks.howToAvoid: Listen for the buzz approaching and dodge to the side before the stinger hits
attacks.notes: Main attack; deals moderate damage and can retreat quickly upon hit

attacks.name: downward sting
attacks.tell: Hovers over the player and stabs downwards with its stinger from close range
attacks.howToAvoid: Block at the right time or move to the side
attacks.notes: Vertical blow; if the block is missed it can inflict considerable damage

description: A noble flying creature that surveys much of the yard, gathers pollen, and forms dense swarms around the Picnic Table.
behavior: It flies high, lands on dandelions to gather pollen, and returns to its colony once loaded. Near the honey pot, many bees sleep on the ground at night.
interactionWithPlayer: It stays neutral unless attacked or unless you push too close to the honey. Once one is angered, nearby bees can turn hostile very quickly.
interactionWithCreatures: It rarely interacts with ground creatures, but wasps and wasp drones frequently attack bees when they meet in the air.
strategy: Fresh and chopping work well, but the real danger is fighting several at once. The pollen cloud slows you heavily, so punish when one descends and do not overextend under the swarm.

loot.notes: Only while carried on its legs

combatStats.attackDamageSummary:
Bite: 50
Combo Sting: 70
Charged Sting: 90
Pollen Cloud: 25

specialTraits: Its pollen cloud heavily reduces movement speed.
